hooks.command: jq -nc --arg m 'Semfora-first: prefer mcp__semfora__search / get_source / get_callers over grep/cat/Read of source files (see CLAUDE.md). Read is only for files you are about to Edit, or small config/docs.' '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:$m}}'

c=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" 2>/dev/null); if printf "%s" "$c" | grep -qE "(^|[|;&])[[:space:]]*(grep|rg|cat|sed)[[:space:]]" && printf "%s" "$c" | grep -qE "[^\"']\.(rs|ev)\b"; then jq -nc --arg m "Semfora-first: prefer mcp__semfora__search / get_source / get_callers over grep/cat/Read of source files (see CLAUDE.md). Read is only for files you are about to Edit, or small config/docs." "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PreToolUse\",additionalContext:\$m}}"; fi
